name: Cefotetan
description: A semisynthetic cephamycin antibiotic that is administered intravenously or intramuscularly. The drug is highly resistant to a broad spectrum of beta-lactamases and is active against a wide range of both aerobic and anaerobic gram-positive and gram-negative microorganisms. [PubChem]
indication: For prophylaxis and treatment of bacterial infections.
mechanismOfAction: The bactericidal action of cefotetan results from inhibition of cell wall synthesis by binding and inhibiting the bacterial penicillin binding proteins which help in the cell wall biosynthesis.
pharmacodynamics: Cefotetan is a semisynthetic cephamycin antibiotic that is administered intravenously or intramuscularly. The drug is highly resistant to a broad spectrum of beta-lactamases and is active against a wide range of both aerobic and anaerobic gram-positive and gram-negative microorganisms.

interactions.name: BCG vaccine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of BCG vaccine can be decreased when used in combination with Cefotetan.

interactions.name: Picosulfuric acid
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Picosulfuric acid can be decreased when used in combination with Cefotetan.

interactions.name: Warfarin
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Warfarin.

interactions.name: Dicoumarol
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Dicoumarol.

interactions.name: Phenindione
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenindione.

interactions.name: Phenprocoumon
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Phenprocoumon.

interactions.name: Acenocoumarol
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Acenocoumarol.

interactions.name: Ethyl biscoumacetate
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Ethyl biscoumacetate.

interactions.name: Fluindione
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Fluindione.

interactions.name: Clorindione
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Clorindione.

interactions.name: Diphenadione
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Diphenadione.

interactions.name: Tioclomarol
interactions.description: Cefotetan may increase the anticoagulant activities of Tioclomarol.

interactions.name: Probenecid
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cefotetan can be increased when it is combined with Probenecid.

interactions.name: Ethanol
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cefotetan is combined with Ethanol.

interactions.name: Carbocisteine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cefotetan is combined with Carbocisteine.
